meaning: n.裸麦,黑麦,绅士,吉普赛绅士
examples: Rye is tolerant of poor, acid soils.
I was eating ham and Swiss cheese on rye.
One of the first crops that I grew when we came here was rye.
In fact, many bartenders would say the only proper way to make a Manhattan is with rye.
The press, however, accuses the venture capitalists for feeding it bologna on rye bread.
